summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VMS360 Multi-Floor View feature. All 8 features tested and verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - recharts component sizing issue on initial load

passed_tests: Tüm Katları Göster button visible when store has multiple floors
Button shows floor count (4) in parentheses
Multi-floor view shows all 4 floors in grid layout (2x4 responsive grid)
Each floor card shows floor name (B1 - Otopark, AVM Ana Koridor, etc.)
Each floor card shows floor number (Kat B1, Kat 0, Kat 1, Kat 2)
Each floor card shows camera count (0 kamera, 4 kamera)
Each floor card shows area dimensions (60x40m, 40x12m, 45x25m, 40x20m)
Floor card with plan (AVM Ana Koridor) shows mini preview with camera positions
Floor cards without cameras show 'Kamera yok' message
Green indicator dot shown for floors with plan
Yenile button visible in multi-floor view header
Yenile button refreshes multi-floor data when clicked
Clicking floor card opens single floor detailed view with heatmap canvas
Multi-floor section hides when floor card is clicked
Individual floor buttons (B1-Otopark, AVM Ana Koridor, 1.Kat, 2.Kat) are disabled when multi-floor view is active
Tüm Katları Göster button state changes correctly (active/inactive)
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-floor view implementation is well-structured with proper state management
Floor cards correctly display all required information
Click handlers properly transition between multi-floor and single-floor views
Disabled state for individual floor buttons prevents conflicting selections
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - Store: Forum Kadikoy with 4 floors (B1-Otopark, AVM Ana Koridor, 1.Kat-Moda Mağazaları, 2.Kat-Yeme İçme Alanı)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-floor view feature fully tested and working. Store Forum Kadikoy has 4 floors. Only AVM Ana Koridor (floor_id: c713f669-075f-4e06-b252-9b5fd57ac1eb) has floor plan and 4 positioned cameras. Other floors have placeholder displays with 'Kamera yok' message.

grid_layout.columns: 2 on medium screens, 4 on xl screens

floor_card_content.header: Floor name + Floor number (Kat X or Kat BX for basement)
floor_card_content.plan_indicator: Green dot for floors with plan
floor_card_content.preview: Mini heatmap preview with camera positions for floors with cameras
floor_card_content.no_camera_message: Kamera yok for floors without cameras
floor_card_content.stats: Camera count, area dimensions, visitor count

floor_card_click.behavior: Opens single floor detailed view with full heatmap
floor_card_click.state_change: Hides multi-floor section, enables individual floor buttons

disabled_buttons.behavior: Individual floor buttons disabled when multi-floor view is active
